name: pedal-bench-workspace
description: Workspace scripts for pedal-bench (runs in PowerShell, cmd, or bash).

scripts.setup: npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend
scripts.setup:backend: python -m venv .venv && .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install --upgrade pip && .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -e backend[dev]
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
